name: Issue Triage & Classification
description: Classify incoming issues by type and priority, assign to the appropriate team, and add labels.
steps: Read and classify the issue. Determine if it is a bug, feature request, question, or documentation issue. Assess priority (critical, high, medium, low).
Based on the classification, determine which team or person should handle this issue. Consider the affected area of the codebase.
Summarize the triage decision: classification, priority, suggested assignee, and recommended labels.
